heroInsight: Carousels are dominating with a 61% share of content and 2.5x higher engagement than static posts, making them the go-to format for gymfluencers right now.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are currently outperforming other formats due to their high engagement and shareability, especially with gym-related content.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels remain highly relevant with a strong retention rate in the first 3 seconds boosting engagement.

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Carousels are seeing massive save rates, rivaling Reels with 2.5x engagement over static posts.

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories are essential for daily engagement but lack the long-term impact of carousels or Reels.

data.name: Static
data.note: Static posts are underperforming compared to more dynamic formats like carousels and Reels.

critical: DM shares = 3-5x more valuable than likes; encourage sharing your posts directly.
Saves = 25% of ranking power; include 'save this for later' CTAs.
First 3 seconds retention = everything for Reels; use strong hooks immediately.
Originality score: 10+ reposts in 30 days = shadowbanned from recommendations.
Optimize for collections; carousels seeing massive save rates.
proTips: Post carousel content at 6-7AM — 40% higher save rates in gym demographic.
Use 'save this' CTAs in slide 3-4 of carousels — drives collection adds.
Use powerful hooks in the first 3 seconds of IG Reels to maximize retention.
Encourage DM shares in captions to leverage the 3-5x value over likes.
Create unique content to avoid shadowbans; 10+ reposts in 30 days can hurt reach.

tiktokCrossover.summary: TikTok trends like #musclebuilding are emerging and haven't fully penetrated IG yet, offering a first-mover advantage.
